title: digitaria digitata
intro: Digitaria digitata, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass belonging to the genus Digitaria, which is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Digitaria digitata include reducing fever, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Digitaria digitata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
